# AskSerega — Engineering Knowledge Catalog

Open-source catalog of frameworks for building a shared theory of a software system.

## Docs
- [README](/README.md)
- [Contributing](/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Framework chains spec](/openspec/changes/mdx-theory-builder/specs/framework-chains/spec.md)

## Content
- [Framework MDX template](/content/frameworks/_template.mdx)
- [All frameworks](/content/frameworks/)

## Code
